name: Group-Object
-AsHashTable
-AHT
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet returns the group as a hash table. The keys of the hash table are the property values by which the objects are grouped. The values of the hash table are the objects that have that property value.

options.name: -AsString
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet converts the hash table keys to strings. By default, the hash table keys are instances of the grouped object. This parameter is valid only when used with the AsHashTable parameter.

options.name: -CaseSensitive
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet makes the grouping case-sensitive. Without this parameter, the property values of objects in a group might have different cases.

options.name: -Culture
options.description: Specifies the culture to use when comparing strings.

options.name: -InputObject
options.description: Specifies the objects to group. Enter a variable that contains the objects, or type a command or expression that gets the objects.

options.name: -NoElement
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet omits the members of a group from the results.

options.name: -Property
options.description: Specifies the properties for grouping. The objects are arranged into named groups based on the value of the specified properties. When no property is specified, objects are grouped by their value or the `ToString()` representation of their value. The output is sorted in ascending order by the group names.

args.name: -Property
args.description: Specifies the properties for grouping. The objects are arranged into named groups based on the value of the specified properties. When no property is specified, objects are grouped by their value or the `ToString()` representation of their value. The output is sorted in ascending order by the group names.

description: Groups objects that contain the same value for specified properties.
